hooks.command: env > /tmp/kanban-hook-debug.txt 2>&1; if [ -n "$KANBAN_TASK_ID" ] && command -v kanban-agent >/dev/null 2>&1; then kanban-agent notify "Claude Finished" "Task $KANBAN_TASK_ID — Claude has finished responding" --task "$KANBAN_TASK_ID" >> /tmp/kanban-hook-debug.txt 2>&1; else echo 'SKIPPED: KANBAN_TASK_ID not set or kanban-agent not found' >> /tmp/kanban-hook-debug.txt; fi
